CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL(Service_File__r.Cert_or_Inelig_Date__c) = false, TEXT(Service_File__r.HOMEtracker__Status__c) , CASE(TEXT(Tracker_Status__c), '','NEEDS STATUS', 'Flagged','FLAGGED', 'Hidden','Waiting To Be Backup', 'Backup',IF( TEXT(Landlord_Developer_Determination__c) ='','Backup','BACKUP w DETERMINATION'), 'Primary', IF(TEXT(Landlord_Developer_Determination__c) = '','Needs Property Approval', IF( ISBLANK(Date_Eligibility_Review_Began__c ),'Needs CGPH Eligibility', TEXT(Service_File__r.Application_Workflow_Status__c ) )),'?'))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated stage in the process of the tracking workflow.
CustomField.label: Applicant Stage
